title: mirabilis rotundifolia
intro: Mirabilis rotundifolia, also known as the red valerian or red valerian root, is a type of flowering plant native to North America. The medicinal properties of Mirabilis rotundifolia include its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and have antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and digestive problems, offering health benefits such as improved wound healing and reduced inflammation. Herbal preparations of Mirabilis rotundifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
